chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2020 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 25.03.2026 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Awan, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Adnan Arshad, SSP NAB Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy A. G Pakistan ************** After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has moved an application before the Ministry of Interior, Government of Pakistan, Islamabad, for redressal of his grievance; however, the same has not yet been decided. Learned DAG and SSP NAB seek disposal of the instant petition and have accorded their no objection if the Ministry of Interior, Government of Pakistan, Islamabad, decides the application moved by the petitioner in accordance with law. Upon this, learned counsel for the petitioner has shown satisfaction. In view of the above, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of with directions to the Ministry of Interior, Government of Pakistan, Islamabad, to decide the application dated 18.09.2024, moved by the petitioner along with the statement dated 30.01.2026, within 30 days, and to submit a compliance report to this Court for perusal. Office to communicate the copy of this order to learned DAG for information and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
